title: Applications Open: Worlds 2026 Artist Alley
summary: Applications Open: Worlds 2026 Artist Alley  League of Legends
content:
Worlds brings together the best teams, players, and fans from around the globe for an epic celebration of League of Legends at Fan Fest. In 2026, that celebration comes to New York City, and applications for the Artist Alley Presented by Mastercard are now open.

From champion fan art and handmade crafts to apparel, prints, and original creations, artists have been at the heart of the League community for more than fifteen years. To celebrate that creativity, Riot Games and Mastercard are inviting artists from around the world to be part of Fan Fest, creating a dedicated space where selected creators can showcase and sell their wares, connect with fellow fans, and bring their passion for League to life.

Applications for Artist Alley presented by Mastercard at Worlds 2026 Fan Fest arenow open!

Artists from all regions are encouraged to applyhere.

title: Sources: LYON will field Armao to replace Inspired for Week 1 of the LCS Summer Split
summary: Sources: LYON will field Armao to replace Inspired for Week 1 of the LCS Summer Split  Sheep Esports
content:
The competitive League of Legends ecosystem is buzzing following the latest announcement regarding 'Sources: LYON will field Armao to replace Inspired for Week 1 of the LCS Summer Split'. As the season progresses, this development has quickly taken center stage, drawing intense scrutiny from fans, analysts, and professional players alike. The core update highlights a significant shift that is expected to have wide-ranging consequences for the regional leagues and international tournaments.

The LCS is undergoing a massive transformation, and this latest update adds another layer of complexity to the competition. With powerhouse teams like Cloud9, FlyQuest, and Team Liquid vying for domestic supremacy, draft flexibility will be the ultimate key to success. Head coaches are already working overtime to ensure their players are comfortable with the latest mechanical nuances.

Speaking on the recent events, seasoned esports analysts noted that 'Sources: LYON will field Armao to replace Inspired for Week 1 of the LCS Summer Split  Sheep Esports' is not just a temporary trend but a fundamental shift in how teams will approach their upcoming matchdays. 'Draft priority and map control are going to be completely redefined over the next few weeks,' remarked a prominent league caster. 'Teams that fail to recognize the gravity of this change will find themselves falling behind very quickly in the standings.'

As the community awaits the upcoming weekend matches, anticipation continues to build. Fans can catch all the high-stakes action live on official streaming channels, complete with expert desk analysis and live regional broadcasts. With so much on the line, the next chapter of the 2026 competitive season promises to deliver some of the most memorable moments in League of Legends esports history.

title: "From MakNooN to InSec": 'LCK Legends Match' Player Lineup Revealed
summary: "From MakNooN to InSec": 'LCK Legends Match' Player Lineup Revealed  Inven Global
content:
Players who thrilled fans during the early days of domestic League of Legends esports are gathering to recreate the 'Era of Romance.'

Riot Games, the organizer of the League of Legends Champions Korea (LCK), has announced the player lineup for the 'LCK Legends Match,' which will take place on Tuesday, August 4, at LoL PARK in Jongno-gu, Seoul.

The LCK Legend Match will feature a showdown between 'Team Samsung Telecom' and 'Team CJ Rolster,' consisting of players who achieved remarkable success in the early days of LoL esports. 'Team Samsung Telecom' includes top laner 'Looper' Jang Hyeong-seok, jungler 'Spirit' Lee Da-yoon, mid laner 'Pawn' Heo Won-seok, and Supporter 'Heart' Lee Kwan-hyung, along with 'Piglet' Chae Gwang-jin, who played as a bot laner during SK Telecom T1's 2013 World Championship victory. Jang and Heo were teammates on Samsung Galaxy White, winning the 2014 World Championship, while Lee Da-yoon and Lee Kwan-hyung lifted the trophy at the 2014 LoL Champions Spring as members of Samsung Galaxy Blue.

'Team CJ Rolster' is composed of players known for unforgettable, iconic plays. Top laner 'MakNooN' Yoon Ha-woon is famous for popularizing fountain dives, while jungler 'inSec' Choi In-seok showcased fantastic skill combos on Lee Sin, coining the term 'inSec Kick.' Mid laner 'Kuro' Lee Seo-haeng led the Tigers dynasty alongside Supporter 'GorillA' Kang Beom-hyun, and bot laner 'Captain Jack' Kang Hyung-woo was once hailed for his peak mechanical prowess after executing four consecutive crowd control cleanses on Sivir.

These legendary players, whom early LoL esports fans will never forget, will face off in a 'League of Legends Classic (LoL Classic)' match. Riot Games previously held an event match using 'LoL Classic' on Sunday, the 12nd, at the 2026 Mid-Season Invitational (MSI) finals held at the Daejeon Convention Center (DCC) Exhibition Hall 2 in Yuseong-gu, Daejeon. Fans at the venue enjoyed the debut of the LoL Classic event match, feeling as though they had stepped into a time machine to relive memories from over a decade ago.

This LCK Legend Match is planned as an extension of that LoL Classic event. Legendary players who laid the foundation for the LCK to reach the pinnacle of global LoL esports will gather to offer a sense of nostalgia for the 'Era of Romance.' The broadcast will feature current LCK caster Jeon Yong-jun and commentator 'CloudTemplar' Lee Hyun-woo, joined by former commentator Kang Min. The English broadcast will feature Brendan 'Valdes' Valdes and Nick 'LS' De Cesare, who previously worked together in 2017.
